since_last: 50% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +0.82%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 50% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.19% · BTC +0.98% · Gold +0.00% · Nasdaq100 +0.04%. 50% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +0.82%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +0.82%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -0.81%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMBA is the standout at +6.24%
cards.body: Leaders: AMBA +6.24%, BABA +4.70%, SMR +3.63%, TER +3.40%, MRVL +3.01%. Laggards: ORCL -3.59%, DELL -3.56%, TLN -3.24%, KLAC -3.08%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.98% at $120.3
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.98% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
